# Curfee — Structure that lasts

> Software architecture consulting from Salzburg, Austria. Examining systems, establishing structure, anchoring decisions.

Curfee is a software architecture consultancy founded by Philipp Höllinger, based in Salzburg, Austria. The company provides independent, vendor-neutral consulting for organizations that need clarity about their software systems.

## Services

- [Diagnosis](/services/diagnosis): Straight to the root cause. I start with what brought you here — and trace it to its root cause, layer by layer through your system. Concise assessment with root cause, impact, and recommended next steps. Duration: from 2 weeks. Investment: from €10,000.
- [Guidance](/services/guidance): From root cause to solution. I find the root cause, design the solution, and guide the execution — until the structure stands. Duration: project-dependent. Investment: from €30,000.
- [Sparring](/services/sparring): Alignment that grows with you. Your system evolves — I evaluate decisions and provide well-founded feedback before they take effect. Duration: ongoing. Investment: on request.

## About

Philipp Höllinger is a software architect with deep expertise in system analysis, architecture design, and structural consulting. Based in Salzburg, Austria.

- Website: https://curfee.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/phoellinger
- Email: office@curfee.com
